findings.description: ITEMS-7-9: Sanity run tagged as 'custom' instead of 'Sanity'; CSV exports all test types instead of latest run; Test Summary shows all types instead of filtering to latest run
findings.line_numbers: tier propagation, CSV filter, summary filter

findings.description: ITEM-7: tier value lost when writing to run-history.json — clicking Sanity produces {tier: 'custom'}
Notification data loss — conflicting array vs object writes to SUPERVISOR_NOTIFICATION.json
Config file destructively mutated on every API call to /api/qa/run
Missing summary fields in test results collector (testTypesTotal, qualityGatesPassed/Total, openDefects)

fixes.fix_description: Fixed all 3 bugs: tier propagation chain repaired, CSV filter scoped to latest run, Test Summary filters by active run tier
Added tierArg to spawn arguments in run/route.ts and fixed tier propagation to run-tests.js
Removed conflicting snapshot write to SUPERVISOR_NOTIFICATION.json. Kept proper array-based notification writes only.
Removed destructive config mutation code. tier/type info now passed directly via spawn arguments instead of mutating config file on disk.
Added testTypesTotal, qualityGatesPassed, qualityGatesTotal, openDefects summary fields to collect-test-results.js

agent_0_verification.notes: v3.3 work order completed. All 9 items implemented. 5 critical/high findings detected by AI code review and fixed. 148/148 tests passing.
